2605.22540.title: Dynamic Hypergraph Representation Learning for Multivariate Time Series without Prior Knowledge
2605.22540.paper_summary: Hypergraphs have the capacity to capture higher-dimensional relationships among entities across various domains, making them a subject of growing interest within the research community for understanding the structure and dynamics of complex systems. However, a key challenge is the derivation of hypergraph representations from time series data in situations where the structure of the hypergraph is limited or absent. In this study, we propose a model that constructs a dynamic hypergraph representation for multivariate time series without relying on prior knowledge of the data. This is achieved by applying community detection to the time series and transforming the resulting communities, obtained through an attention mechanism, into a hypergraph using a clique-based technique. Hypergraph representations are derived from different time series datasets, and the resulting hypergraphs are then used by a Dynamic Hypergraph Attention Convolution Network (DHACN) for multivariate time series predictions. This research advances the field of hypergraph representation by introducing a novel approach that is better suited to uncover high-order relationships without prior knowledge.
2605.22540.paper_summary_zh: 超圖具有捕捉各個領域實體之間高維關係的能力，使其在研究社群中對理解複雜系統的結構和動態變得越來越受到關注。然而，一個主要挑戰是在超圖結構有限或缺失的情況下，從時間序列數據中推導出超圖表示。在本研究中，我們提出了一個模型，該模型為多變量時間序列構建動態超圖表示，而不依賴於對數據的先驗知識。這是通過對時間序列應用社群檢測，並利用注意力機制將所得到的社群轉換為超圖，使用基於團的技術來實現的。超圖表示是從不同的時間序列數據集推導而來，然後由動態超圖注意力卷積網絡（DHACN）用於多變量時間序列預測。本研究通過引入一種更適合於揭示高階關係的新方法，推進了超圖表示的領域，而無需先驗知識。
2605.22540.author: Marco Gregnanin et.al.
2605.22540.authors: Marco Gregnanin, Johannes De Smedt, Giorgio Gnecco, Maurizio Parton
